title: Bring up LilyGO local client transports
description: Why this exists: LilyGO should validate the native app paths, not only radio boot. What needs to be done: verify USB CDC/serial shell or SLIP path, BLE advertising/connectivity where hardware supports BLE, direct BLE native-app service assumptions, and IP/CoAP LCI path where available. Acceptance criteria: host can discover/connect over the supported local path; at least one native app smoke path works from Linux or macOS; BLE service/characteristic UUIDs or serial endpoints are recorded; unsupported transport cases are explicit and filed if needed.
